text: This space feels clinical and modern, its glass and light creating a sense of transparency and possibility. As I move deeper and encounter the R+D exhibit, I'm struck by a sort of quiet awe at humanity's ceaseless curiosity: our drive to learn, innovate, and reimagine how we live alongside technology. It's invigorating—and humbling—to stand at the threshold of creation and contemplation, surrounded by the artifacts and intentions of progress.
